title: Soulection Radio Show #419 w/Tay Iwar
content:
Nigerian artist Tay Iwar guests and performs acoustically.
<!--more-->

👉[Stream / Download GEMINI](https://soundcloud.com/soulection/sets/tay-iwar-gemini) [Soulection Records]👈

Follow Tay Iwar on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/tayiwar), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/Tayiwar), [FaceBook](https://www.facebook.com/Tayiwar), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/tayiwar/), [Apple Music](https://itunes.apple.com/gb/artist/tay-iwar/id1091633410?at=1010lMz4), and [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/artist/0iqznAW9pzZ7KOjx8aCMWo).

[Find out when Tay is next performing near you on SongKick](https://www.songkick.com/artists/9202269-tay-iwar)
